label: Interests
title: The things I keep coming back to

cards.title: Hosting & sysadmin
cards.body: I like building and managing hosting setups that feel clean, stable, and fast, from the server layer up through the networking and operational side.

cards.title: DDoS-protected solutions
cards.body: I enjoy comparing providers, balancing costs, and putting together tailored solutions with the protection level and routing that fit the actual use case.

cards.title: Game modding
cards.body: I also enjoy making funny mods for games like Subnautica, Terraria, and My Summer Car so I can mess around and have fun with friends. I like the creative side of changing how games feel, especially when the end result is something chaotic and memorable to play together.

cards.title: Performance-minded builds
cards.body: I care a lot about price-to-performance, practical tuning, and making sure the final setup feels right instead of overbuilt or overpriced.

cards.title: Hosting platforms & tooling
cards.body: I like working with hosting and operations software such as Wazuh, Wisp.gg, Pterodactyl, Pelican Panel, and Kubernetes when building setups that need to be manageable as well as powerful.

cards.title: Firewalls & packet path tech
cards.body: I'm also interested in firewall hardware and traffic-handling technologies, including Fortinet firewalls, Sophos firewalls, and lower-level technologies like XDP.
